       "\u001b[34m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[38;2;230;219;116;49m\"{\\\"query\\\": \\\"MUVERA features and benefits in healthcare\\\"}\"\u001b[0m                                                  \u001b[34m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[34m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[34m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[34m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Output ──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">{</span>                                                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"In other words - the main tradeoffs of enabling MUVERA are going to be the reduction in recall,</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and associated reduction in throughput by needing to use higher `ef` values. Nothing's ever so simple, right?</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">\\ud83d\\ude05 What's clear from these charts is that there is a definite case to be made for using MUVERA. The</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">specifics, however, would very much depend on your priorities. ## Wrap-up\\n\\nimport MuveraCompared from </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">'./img/muvera_compared.png';\\n\\n&lt;Figure&gt;\\n  &lt;img\\n    alt=\\\"MUVERA compared\\\"\\n    src={MuveraCompared}\\n    </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">width=\\\"100%\\\"\\n  /&gt;\\n  &lt;figcaption&gt;&lt;small&gt;MUVERA compared&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/small&gt;&lt;/figcaption&gt;\\n&lt;/Figure&gt;\\n\\nIn </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">summary, MUVERA offers a compelling path forward for working with multi-vector models at scale.\",</span>              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"MUVERA + sq\\\"\\n    src={TestResultsRecall}\\n    width=\\\"600\\\"\\n  /&gt;\\n  </span>                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">&lt;figcaption&gt;&lt;small&gt;Recall without using MUVERA + sq vs. MUVERA + sq&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br </span>                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">/&gt;&lt;/small&gt;&lt;/figcaption&gt;\\n&lt;/Figure&gt;\\n\\n:::note Test setup\\nThe experiments have been run on the following </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">machine:\\n\\n- CPU/GPU: AMD Ryzen 7 PRO 8700GE w/ Radeon 780M Graphics\\n- RAM: 64GB\\n:::\\n\\n### Clear </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">benefits: Memory &amp; ingestion speed\\n\\nAs expected, there is a significant reduction in memory footprint, </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">going from a baseline of around 12 GB to under 1GB for MUVERA. What does that mean in terms of dollar </span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">amounts? Well, the difference in compute costs at a hyperscaler for a server with 12 GB of memory and another</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">with 1 GB would be many tens of thousands of dollars per year, if not hundreds of thousands. If your dataset </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">size ranges in tens or millions or more, as many of our users' datasets do, this may already be a strong </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">motivator for MUVERA.\",</span>                                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"By transforming multi-vector representations into fixed dimensional encodings, it delivers </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">significant memory savings and improved query speeds while maintaining relatively strong retrieval quality. </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate's implementation of MUVERA enables the ability to further co...</span>                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m Tool Output \u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m{\u001b[0m                                                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"In other words - the main tradeoffs of enabling MUVERA are going to be the reduction in recall,\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand associated reduction in throughput by needing to use higher `ef` values. Nothing's ever so simple, right?\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m\\ud83d\\ude05 What's clear from these charts is that there is a definite case to be made for using MUVERA. The\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mspecifics, however, would very much depend on your priorities. ## Wrap-up\\n\\nimport MuveraCompared from \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m'./img/muvera_compared.png';\\n\\n<Figure>\\n  <img\\n    alt=\\\"MUVERA compared\\\"\\n    src={MuveraCompared}\\n    \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwidth=\\\"100%\\\"\\n  />\\n  <figcaption><small>MUVERA compared<br /><br /></small></figcaption>\\n</Figure>\\n\\nIn \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msummary, MUVERA offers a compelling path forward for working with multi-vector models at scale.\",\u001b[0m              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"MUVERA + sq\\\"\\n    src={TestResultsRecall}\\n    width=\\\"600\\\"\\n  />\\n  \u001b[0m                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m<figcaption><small>Recall without using MUVERA + sq vs. MUVERA + sq<br /><br \u001b[0m                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m/></small></figcaption>\\n</Figure>\\n\\n:::note Test setup\\nThe experiments have been run on the following \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmachine:\\n\\n- CPU/GPU: AMD Ryzen 7 PRO 8700GE w/ Radeon 780M Graphics\\n- RAM: 64GB\\n:::\\n\\n### Clear \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbenefits: Memory & ingestion speed\\n\\nAs expected, there is a significant reduction in memory footprint, \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mgoing from a baseline of around 12 GB to under 1GB for MUVERA. What does that mean in terms of dollar \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mamounts? Well, the difference in compute costs at a hyperscaler for a server with 12 GB of memory and another\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwith 1 GB would be many tens of thousands of dollars per year, if not hundreds of thousands. If your dataset \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msize ranges in tens or millions or more, as many of our users' datasets do, this may already be a strong \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmotivator for MUVERA.\",\u001b[0m                                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"By transforming multi-vector representations into fixed dimensional encodings, it delivers \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msignificant memory savings and improved query speeds while maintaining relatively strong retrieval quality. \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate's implementation of MUVERA enables the ability to further co...\u001b[0m                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\">\n",

       "\n"

     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"

    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">AI-savvy marketer specializing in healthcare systems, digital health, and patient engagement.</span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### MUVERA: Enhancing Healthcare Systems with Multi-Vector Retrieval</span>                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**Overview of MUVERA**</span>                                                                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">MUVERA is a groundbreaking feature within the Weaviate vector database, designed to optimize the handling of </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">multi-vector embeddings. By transforming multi-vector representations into fixed-dimensional encodings, </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">MUVERA reduces memory usage significantly and improves query speeds while maintaining the quality of </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">retrieval. </span>                                                                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**Key Benefits of MUVERA for Healthcare**</span>                                                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">1. **Memory Efficiency**: One of the most notable advantages of MUVERA is its ability to reduce memory </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">footprint dramatically. As reported, using MUVERA can cut memory requirements from approximately 12 GB to </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">under 1 GB for healthcare applications that leverage extensive datasets. For hospitals and healthcare systems</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">with large data repositories, this translates to considerable savings on computational resources and energy </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">costs, which could reach tens to hundreds of thousands of dollars per year.</span>                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">2. **Faster Ingestion and Query Speeds**: In healthcare, speed is crucial for improving patient outcomes. </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">MUVERA can accelerate data ingestion processes from upwards of 20 minutes to an impressive 3-6 minutes. This </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">is particularly beneficial when timely access to patient data, medical histories, or imaging studies is </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">necessary. Improved query speeds further enhance the efficiency of patient triage systems, allowing </span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m ✅ Agent Final Answer \u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mAI-savvy marketer specializing in healthcare systems, digital health, and patient engagement.\u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mFinal Answer:\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### MUVERA: Enhancing Healthcare Systems with Multi-Vector Retrieval\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**Overview of MUVERA**\u001b[0m                                                                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMUVERA is a groundbreaking feature within the Weaviate vector database, designed to optimize the handling of \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmulti-vector embeddings. By transforming multi-vector representations into fixed-dimensional encodings, \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMUVERA reduces memory usage significantly and improves query speeds while maintaining the quality of \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mretrieval. \u001b[0m                                                                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**Key Benefits of MUVERA for Healthcare**\u001b[0m                                                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m1. **Memory Efficiency**: One of the most notable advantages of MUVERA is its ability to reduce memory \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfootprint dramatically. As reported, using MUVERA can cut memory requirements from approximately 12 GB to \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92munder 1 GB for healthcare applications that leverage extensive datasets. For hospitals and healthcare systems\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwith large data repositories, this translates to considerable savings on computational resources and energy \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcosts, which could reach tens to hundreds of thousands of dollars per year.\u001b[0m                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m2. **Faster Ingestion and Query Speeds**: In healthcare, speed is crucial for improving patient outcomes. \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMUVERA can accelerate data ingestion processes from upwards of 20 minutes to an impressive 3-6 minutes. This \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mis particularly beneficial when timely access to patient data, medical histories, or imaging studies is \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mnecessary. Improved query speeds further enhance the efficiency of patient triage systems, allowing \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mclinicians to retrieve relevant patient data more swiftly.\u001b[0m                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m3. **Enhancing Retrieval Quality with Minimal Trade-offs**: While some loss in recall quality may occur with \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMUVERA when compared to traditional methods, this can be mitigated by adjusting specific parameters like HNSW\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mef values. For healthcare applications where slight recall degradation can be tolerated, MUVERA provides a \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mpragmatic solution, optimizing resource use without severely compromising the quality of results.\u001b[0m              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m4. **Scalability for Large Datasets**: Given the size of data handled by healthcare providers, MUVERA is \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mideally suited for large-scale deployments. Hospitals often deal with vast amounts of data that require \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mefficient processing and retrieval solutions. MUVERA's ability to compress and handle multi-vector embeddings\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmakes it a strong contender for integration into electronic health records (EHRs) and clinical support \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msystems.\u001b[0m                                                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m5. **Simplicity of Implementation**: From a technical perspective, enabling MUVERA within Weaviate is \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mremarkably straightforward, requiring only a few lines of code. This ease of implementation means healthcare \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIT departments can reduce the time and resources spent on setting up complex systems, focusing instead on \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mimproving patient care and engagement solutions.\u001b[0m                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**Conclusion**\u001b[0m                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIncorporating MUVERA into healthcare systems promises to bring about substantial operational efficiencies, \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92menhance patient care, and drive down costs associated with data management. As healthcare pushes towards more\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdigital and data-driven approaches, leveraging Weaviate's MUVERA can represent a strategic advantage, \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92moptimizing workflows in hospital systems and improving health communication with patients. By transforming \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhow healthcare entities manage and retrieve data, MUVERA stands to play a critical role in advancing the \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mindustry's capabilities in leveraging vast datasets effectively.\u001b[0m                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",

       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[35m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m 🔧 Agent Tool Execution \u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mInsight analyst exploring innovations in finance, wealth tech, and regulatory tech\u001b[0m                      \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mThought: \u001b[0m\u001b[92mI have found relevant information about MUVERA and its applications, especially regarding its \u001b[0m        \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfeatures that can impact the financial sector.\u001b[0m                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Input ───────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #e6db74; text-decoration-color: #e6db74; background-color: #ffffff\">\"{\\\"query\\\": \\\"MUVERA features benefits in the financial industry\\\"}\"</span>                                          <span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">│</span>\n",

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[34m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[34m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[34m Tool Input \u001b[0m\u001b[34m──────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[34m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[34m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[34m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[34m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[38;2;230;219;116;49m\"{\\\"query\\\": \\\"MUVERA features benefits in the financial industry\\\"}\"\u001b[0m                                          \u001b[34m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[34m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[34m│\u001b[0m\n",

    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Output ──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">{</span>                                                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"In other words - the main tradeoffs of enabling MUVERA are going to be the reduction in recall,</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and associated reduction in throughput by needing to use higher `ef` values. Nothing's ever so simple, right?</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">\\ud83d\\ude05 What's clear from these charts is that there is a definite case to be made for using MUVERA. The</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">specifics, however, would very much depend on your priorities. ## Wrap-up\\n\\nimport MuveraCompared from </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">'./img/muvera_compared.png';\\n\\n&lt;Figure&gt;\\n  &lt;img\\n    alt=\\\"MUVERA compared\\\"\\n    src={MuveraCompared}\\n    </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">width=\\\"100%\\\"\\n  /&gt;\\n  &lt;figcaption&gt;&lt;small&gt;MUVERA compared&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/small&gt;&lt;/figcaption&gt;\\n&lt;/Figure&gt;\\n\\nIn </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">summary, MUVERA offers a compelling path forward for working with multi-vector models at scale.\",</span>              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"By transforming multi-vector representations into fixed dimensional encodings, it delivers </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">significant memory savings and improved query speeds while maintaining relatively strong retrieval quality. </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate's implementation of MUVERA enables the ability to further compress these encodings with quantization</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">for production deployments at scale, dramatically reducing the cost and overhead needed for multi-vector </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">embeddings. As always - using the Weaviate implementation (available form Weaviate `1.31` onwards) may be the</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">easiest part of all this. You may be surprised to hear that [just a couple of lines of </span>                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">code](/developers/weaviate/configuration/compression/multi-vectors#muvera-encoding) is all you need to enable</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">MUVERA in a Weaviate collection. If your use case could benefit from using multi-vector embeddings, and your </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">use case may require a non-trivial dataset size, MUVERA could be a part of the solution set for you.\",</span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"MUVERA + sq\\\"\\n    src={TestResultsRecall}\\n    width=\\\"600\\\"\\n  /&gt;\\n  </span>                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">&lt;figcaption&gt;&lt;small&gt;Recall without using MUVERA + sq vs. MUVERA + sq&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br </span>                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">/&gt;&lt;/small&gt;&lt;/figcaption&gt;\\n&lt;/Figure&gt;\\n\\n:::note Test setup\\nThe experiments have been run on the f...</span>            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m Tool Output \u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m{\u001b[0m                                                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"In other words - the main tradeoffs of enabling MUVERA are going to be the reduction in recall,\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand associated reduction in throughput by needing to use higher `ef` values. Nothing's ever so simple, right?\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m\\ud83d\\ude05 What's clear from these charts is that there is a definite case to be made for using MUVERA. The\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mspecifics, however, would very much depend on your priorities. ## Wrap-up\\n\\nimport MuveraCompared from \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m'./img/muvera_compared.png';\\n\\n<Figure>\\n  <img\\n    alt=\\\"MUVERA compared\\\"\\n    src={MuveraCompared}\\n    \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwidth=\\\"100%\\\"\\n  />\\n  <figcaption><small>MUVERA compared<br /><br /></small></figcaption>\\n</Figure>\\n\\nIn \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msummary, MUVERA offers a compelling path forward for working with multi-vector models at scale.\",\u001b[0m              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"By transforming multi-vector representations into fixed dimensional encodings, it delivers \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msignificant memory savings and improved query speeds while maintaining relatively strong retrieval quality. \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate's implementation of MUVERA enables the ability to further compress these encodings with quantization\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfor production deployments at scale, dramatically reducing the cost and overhead needed for multi-vector \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92membeddings. As always - using the Weaviate implementation (available form Weaviate `1.31` onwards) may be the\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92measiest part of all this. You may be surprised to hear that [just a couple of lines of \u001b[0m                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcode](/developers/weaviate/configuration/compression/multi-vectors#muvera-encoding) is all you need to enable\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMUVERA in a Weaviate collection. If your use case could benefit from using multi-vector embeddings, and your \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92muse case may require a non-trivial dataset size, MUVERA could be a part of the solution set for you.\",\u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"MUVERA + sq\\\"\\n    src={TestResultsRecall}\\n    width=\\\"600\\\"\\n  />\\n  \u001b[0m                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m<figcaption><small>Recall without using MUVERA + sq vs. MUVERA + sq<br /><br \u001b[0m                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m/></small></figcaption>\\n</Figure>\\n\\n:::note Test setup\\nThe experiments have been run on the f...\u001b[0m            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Insight analyst exploring innovations in finance, wealth tech, and regulatory tech</span>                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">The gathered information provides a comprehensive view of MUVERA's capabilities and its potential </span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">applications within the financial sector, particularly in enhancing operations in fintech, compliance </span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">automation, and client advisory. Here’s a detailed analysis.</span>                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">---</span>                                                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**Industry Specific Analysis: MUVERA and its Usefulness in the Financial Sector**</span>                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**Industry Specific Analysis: MUVERA and its Usefulness in the Financial Sector**\u001b[0m                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92moperates with vast datasets—be it transactions for fraud detection or customer interaction data for \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mpersonalized services. The financial implications of these memory improvements could amount to tens or \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mpotentially hundreds of thousands of dollars annually in compute costs when utilizing cloud services, thereby\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mappealing to firms looking to manage operational costs effectively.\u001b[0m                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMoreover, the ingestion speed benefits from MUVERA mean that large datasets can be imported and processed \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mexceptionally faster. For instance, a job that previously took several hours to import a million objects can \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbe significantly expedited, thereby increasing the overall productivity of data teams.\u001b[0m                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### 2. Fraud Detection Automation\u001b[0m                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIn the realm of finance, the threat of fraud looms large, necessitating robust detection mechanisms. MUVERA’s\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcapability to manage multi-vector embeddings facilitates advanced anomaly detection algorithms that can \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mevaluate various dimensions of transactional data concurrently. By utilizing MUVERA, financial institutions \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcan improve their fraud detection systems, resulting in quicker identification of suspicious activities, \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92menhancing overall security for both clients and businesses.\u001b[0m                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mImplementing these multi-vector representations allows institutions to leverage complex patterns in customer \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbehavior, thereby automating many tasks that would traditionally require intense manual scrutiny.\u001b[0m              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### 3. Investor Personalization and Client Advisory\u001b[0m                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWith the rise of wealth tech, personalized financial services are critical. MUVERA can support sophisticated \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcustomer segmentation by efficiently handling and analyzing multifaceted client data, such as historical \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mtransactions, preferences, and even social media sentiments. This allows financial advisors to develop \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mtailored investment strategies based on comprehensive client profiles and predicted market movements.\u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mAs a result, advisors equipped with MUVERA-augmented tools can enhance their client interactions, providing \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92minsights that are both timely and relevant, leading to improved customer satisfaction and retention.\u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### 4. Comprehensive Market Research\u001b[0m                                                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIn terms of research and market analysis, MUVERA’s speed and efficiency can dramatically reduce the time \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mrequired to analyze market trends and company performances. With the ability to process complex data \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mstructures and retrieve insights rapidly, financial analysts can make more informed decisions based on \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mreal-time data analytics instead of relying on outdated information.\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe implementation of MUVERA allows for a higher throughput of queries, enabling faster responses to market \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mchanges that are critical in trading scenarios. This agility offers analysts a competitive edge in making \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92minvestment decisions or forecasting market shifts.\u001b[0m                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### Conclusion\u001b[0m                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe integration of MUVERA into financial applications through Weaviate can lead to improved efficiency in \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdata handling, enriched personalization for clients, enhanced fraud detection capabilities, and accelerated \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmarket research processes. As financial institutions strive towards digital transformation and automation, \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthe features provided by MUVERA present a significant enabler of these objectives.\u001b[0m                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIn sum, MUVERA not only improves operational efficiencies but opens new avenues for analytical \u001b[0m                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msophistication, paving the way for innovative applications that can redefine the engagement and security \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbeneficial for the financial sector, underpinning enhanced operational efficiencies and innovative \u001b[0m            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Output ──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">{</span>                                                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"### Massive Scale\\nWeaviate\\u2019s multi-tenancy support was built to scale with your business </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">from the ground up. Supporting over 50,000+ active tenants per node, you need just a 20-node cluster for 1 </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">million active tenants with billions of vectors in total. Run out of space, but want to onboard more tenants?</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Simply add a new node to your existing cluster. Weaviate will automatically schedule new tenants on the node </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">with the least resource usage.\",</span>                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"This reduces manual review time and accelerates approvals, helping payers save both time and </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">money. ### Remote Patient Monitoring &amp; Alerting\\n\\n**Continuous streams of wearable or home-monitoring data </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">(heart rate, glucose, etc.) can overwhelm traditional rule-based systems and miss subtle warning signs.** By </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">streaming sensor feeds into Weaviate alongside patients\\u2019 clinical records, you can define semantic </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">alerts, such as *\\u201cfind glucose readings \\\\&gt;180 mg/dL correlated with rapid heart-rate spikes\\u201d*, so </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">that care teams receive precise, real-time notifications, all within an end-to-end encrypted and </span>              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">immutable-log environment. ### Personalized Patient Appointments\\n\\n**It is difficult for doctors to </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">understand a patient\\u2019s full medical history\\u2014prior visits, prescribed medications, lab </span>               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">results\\u2014when they arrive for their appointment**. Rather than combing through disparate systems, </span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate can enable care teams to access an easy-to-read summary at the point of care, leading to more </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">informed consultations and improved patient experience. ### Medical-Image Metadata Retrieval\\n\\n**Radiology </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and pathology images often come with free-text captions and annotations stored separately, making it hard to </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">find the right scans at scale.** By embedding both image metadata and transcribed notes into Weaviate, </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">clinicians can simply ask *\\u201cshow me all MRI scans of patients with suspected meningioma\\u201d* to </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">retrieve exactly the right series\\u2014complete ...</span>                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m Tool Output \u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m{\u001b[0m                                                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"### Massive Scale\\nWeaviate\\u2019s multi-tenancy support was built to scale with your business \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfrom the ground up. Supporting over 50,000+ active tenants per node, you need just a 20-node cluster for 1 \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmillion active tenants with billions of vectors in total. Run out of space, but want to onboard more tenants?\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mSimply add a new node to your existing cluster. Weaviate will automatically schedule new tenants on the node \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwith the least resource usage.\",\u001b[0m                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"This reduces manual review time and accelerates approvals, helping payers save both time and \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmoney. ### Remote Patient Monitoring & Alerting\\n\\n**Continuous streams of wearable or home-monitoring data \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m(heart rate, glucose, etc.) can overwhelm traditional rule-based systems and miss subtle warning signs.** By \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mstreaming sensor feeds into Weaviate alongside patients\\u2019 clinical records, you can define semantic \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92malerts, such as *\\u201cfind glucose readings \\\\>180 mg/dL correlated with rapid heart-rate spikes\\u201d*, so \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthat care teams receive precise, real-time notifications, all within an end-to-end encrypted and \u001b[0m              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mimmutable-log environment. ### Personalized Patient Appointments\\n\\n**It is difficult for doctors to \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92munderstand a patient\\u2019s full medical history\\u2014prior visits, prescribed medications, lab \u001b[0m               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mresults\\u2014when they arrive for their appointment**. Rather than combing through disparate systems, \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate can enable care teams to access an easy-to-read summary at the point of care, leading to more \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92minformed consultations and improved patient experience. ### Medical-Image Metadata Retrieval\\n\\n**Radiology \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand pathology images often come with free-text captions and annotations stored separately, making it hard to \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfind the right scans at scale.** By embedding both image metadata and transcribed notes into Weaviate, \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mclinicians can simply ask *\\u201cshow me all MRI scans of patients with suspected meningioma\\u201d* to \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mretrieve exactly the right series\\u2014complete ...\u001b[0m                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
