     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Industry researcher focused on biomedical trends and their applications in AI</span>                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Industry Analysis: The Relevance of Multi-tenancy in Biomedical Applications Using Weaviate</span>                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">The healthcare and biomedical industry is rapidly evolving with innovations in digital health technologies, </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">ranging from electronic health records (EHR) systems to complex data analytics applications. As these systems</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">become more integrated and reliant on data-driven insights, the need for efficient management and analysis of</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">diverse datasets has emerged as a critical challenge. Here, Weaviate’s Multi-tenancy feature plays a crucial </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">role in facilitating the intersection of AI, data privacy, and operational efficiency in biomedical </span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">applications.</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**1. Data Isolation and Security**</span>                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Multi-tenancy allows different healthcare organizations (tenants) to operate independently within the same </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">infrastructure, ensuring that their data remains isolated. This characteristic is particularly vital in the </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">biomedical field where adherence to stringent privacy regulations, such as HIPAA and GDPR, is mandatory. With</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate’s multi-tenancy, sensitive patient data can be securely managed so that one healthcare entity cannot</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">access another entity's data, thereby minimizing the risks of data breaches and enhancing patient </span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">confidentiality. The ability to execute GDPR-compliant deletion commands also streamlines compliance efforts,</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">allowing organizations to maintain trust while mitigating risks.</span>                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**2. Scalability for Large Healthcare Networks**</span>                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">The biomedical landscape is characterized by an increasing volume of patient data and growing complexity due </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">to numerous stakeholders involved—from hospitals and laboratories to pharmacies and research institutions. </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate’s multi-tenancy feature supports a scalable architecture that can efficiently handle thousands of </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">active tenants across the same infrastructure without degrading performance. With the capability to support </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">over 50,000+ active tenants per node, Weaviate allows large healthcare networks to manage multiple </span>            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">facilities, departments, or even different specialties under a singular cohesive system. This scalability can</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">significantly improve data interoperability and collaborative research, which are paramount in precision </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">medicine efforts.</span>                                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**3. Improved Patient-Centric Approaches**</span>                                                                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Personalized medicine, where treatment and healthcare delivery are tailored to individual patient needs, </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">requires comprehensive and holistic patient data. Weaviate’s structured multi-tenancy setup enables </span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">healthcare providers to maintain accurate and up-to-date records for countless patients without the fear of </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">data mishaps. The accessibility to streamlined summaries of patient histories, combined with advanced search </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">capabilities, empowers clinicians to make informed decisions quickly. For instance, a doctor can swiftly </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">retrieve medical records related to specific conditions or past treatments, improving the consultation </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

The support for semantic alerts further enhances the potential to detect critical </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

This transformative approach to </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">handling biomedical data enables providers to keep pace with the exponential growth of health information </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">while fostering an environment for scientific collaboration and innovation. </span>                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Harnessing the power of Weaviate in this manner positions organizations at the forefront of the emerging era </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m ✅ Agent Final Answer \u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mIndustry researcher focused on biomedical trends and their applications in AI\u001b[0m                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mFinal Answer:\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### Industry Analysis: The Relevance of Multi-tenancy in Biomedical Applications Using Weaviate\u001b[0m                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe healthcare and biomedical industry is rapidly evolving with innovations in digital health technologies, \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mranging from electronic health records (EHR) systems to complex data analytics applications. As these systems\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbecome more integrated and reliant on data-driven insights, the need for efficient management and analysis of\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdiverse datasets has emerged as a critical challenge. Here, Weaviate’s Multi-tenancy feature plays a crucial \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mrole in facilitating the intersection of AI, data privacy, and operational efficiency in biomedical \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mapplications.\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**1. Data Isolation and Security**\u001b[0m                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMulti-tenancy allows different healthcare organizations (tenants) to operate independently within the same \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92minfrastructure, ensuring that their data remains isolated. This characteristic is particularly vital in the \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbiomedical field where adherence to stringent privacy regulations, such as HIPAA and GDPR, is mandatory. With\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate’s multi-tenancy, sensitive patient data can be securely managed so that one healthcare entity cannot\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92maccess another entity's data, thereby minimizing the risks of data breaches and enhancing patient \u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mconfidentiality. The ability to execute GDPR-compliant deletion commands also streamlines compliance efforts,\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mallowing organizations to maintain trust while mitigating risks.\u001b[0m                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**2. Scalability for Large Healthcare Networks**\u001b[0m                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe biomedical landscape is characterized by an increasing volume of patient data and growing complexity due \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mto numerous stakeholders involved—from hospitals and laboratories to pharmacies and research institutions. \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate’s multi-tenancy feature supports a scalable architecture that can efficiently handle thousands of \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mactive tenants across the same infrastructure without degrading performance. With the capability to support \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mover 50,000+ active tenants per node, Weaviate allows large healthcare networks to manage multiple \u001b[0m            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfacilities, departments, or even different specialties under a singular cohesive system. This scalability can\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msignificantly improve data interoperability and collaborative research, which are paramount in precision \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmedicine efforts.\u001b[0m                                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**3. Improved Patient-Centric Approaches**\u001b[0m                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mPersonalized medicine, where treatment and healthcare delivery are tailored to individual patient needs, \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mrequires comprehensive and holistic patient data. Weaviate’s structured multi-tenancy setup enables \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhealthcare providers to maintain accurate and up-to-date records for countless patients without the fear of \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdata mishaps. The accessibility to streamlined summaries of patient histories, combined with advanced search \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcapabilities, empowers clinicians to make informed decisions quickly. For instance, a doctor can swiftly \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mretrieve medical records related to specific conditions or past treatments, improving the consultation \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mprocess and patient experience. \u001b[0m                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**4. Enhanced Clinical Research and Alert Systems**\u001b[0m                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMulti-tenancy also shines in clinical research environments, where massive amounts of data from various \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mtrials and patient populations are collected. By using Weaviate, researchers can implement seamless data \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mintegration and real-time analyses of health metrics collected from diverse sources such as wearables and \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mremote monitoring systems. The support for semantic alerts further enhances the potential to detect critical \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mchanges in patient health, ensuring timely interventions while maintaining a high level of data segregation \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92macross different research projects and teams.\u001b[0m                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**Conclusion**\u001b[0m                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate’s multi-tenancy capabilities provide a robust framework that addresses the unique challenges faced \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mby the biomedical field today. By leveraging its data isolation, scalability, and enhanced patient engagement\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfeatures, healthcare organizations can not only streamline operations but also advance towards a more \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mpatient-centric model, ultimately leading to improved health outcomes. This transformative approach to \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhandling biomedical data enables providers to keep pace with the exponential growth of health information \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwhile fostering an environment for scientific collaboration and innovation. \u001b[0m                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mHarnessing the power of Weaviate in this manner positions organizations at the forefront of the emerging era \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mof personalized medicine and interconnected healthcare ecosystems.\u001b[0m                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]

       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Output ──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"## No more workarounds: Native multi-tenancy support for the largest of </span>                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">cases\\n\\n![multi-tenancy](./img/multi-tenancy-dark.png#gh-dark-mode-only)\\n![multi-tenancy](./img/multi-tenan</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">cy-light.png#gh-light-mode-only)\\n\\nLet me walk you through the best parts of the native multi-tenancy </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">feature in Weaviate `v1.20` and even some of the plans that we have for upcoming releases. As you will see, </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Multi-Tenancy is not just an additional feature. It is rethinking from the ground up how your business, with </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">its many customers, scales with Weaviate. ### Ease of use of your favorite Weaviate features\\nWeaviate\\u2019s</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">new multi-tenancy mode is opt-in. If you don\\u2019t require it, there are no changes for you.\",</span>                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"But if you have a multi-tenancy case, all you need to do is select multi-tenancy for your class</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">(or classes). You can keep using all your favorite features, including super-fast queries, cross-references, </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and replication. The only change? For every operation, specify the tenant key \\u2013 a user-defined property </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">in your schema. That\\u2019s all that changes.\",</span>                                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"---\\ntitle: Multi-Tenancy Vector Search with millions of tenants\\nslug: </span>                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">multi-tenancy-vector-search\\nauthors: [etienne]\\ndate: 2023-06-15\\nimage: ./img/hero.png\\ntags: </span>               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">feature\\\"\\n\\n---\\n\\n![Multi-Tenancy ](./img/hero.png)\\n\\n&lt;!-- truncate --&gt;\\n\\nLarge-scale setups were always </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">a great reason to choose Weaviate.        "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">billion objects &amp; vectors](/blog/sphere-dataset-in-weaviate). What was a mere experiment back then is a </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">regular production case today. But earlier this year, we saw a shift in usage patterns: As we onboarded more </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and more large-scale and enterprise users, the definition of scale shifted from the number of vectors to the </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">number of individual tenants that can run on a single se...</span>                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m Tool Output \u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m{\u001b[0m                                                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"## No more workarounds: Native multi-tenancy support for the largest of \u001b[0m                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcases\\n\\n![multi-tenancy](./img/multi-tenancy-dark.png#gh-dark-mode-only)\\n![multi-tenancy](./img/multi-tenan\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcy-light.png#gh-light-mode-only)\\n\\nLet me walk you through the best parts of the native multi-tenancy \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfeature in Weaviate `v1.20` and even some of the plans that we have for upcoming releases. As you will see, \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMulti-Tenancy is not just an additional feature. It is rethinking from the ground up how your business, with \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mits many customers, scales with Weaviate. ### Ease of use of your favorite Weaviate features\\nWeaviate\\u2019s\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mnew multi-tenancy mode is opt-in. If you don\\u2019t require it, there are no changes for you.\",\u001b[0m                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"But if you have a multi-tenancy case, all you need to do is select multi-tenancy for your class\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m(or classes). You can keep using all your favorite features, including super-fast queries, cross-references, \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand replication. The only change? For every operation, specify the tenant key \\u2013 a user-defined property \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92min your schema. That\\u2019s all that changes.\",\u001b[0m                                                                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"---\\ntitle: Multi-Tenancy Vector Search with millions of tenants\\nslug: \u001b[0m                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmulti-tenancy-vector-search\\nauthors: [etienne]\\ndate: 2023-06-15\\nimage: ./img/hero.png\\ntags: \u001b[0m               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfeature\\\"\\n\\n---\\n\\n![Multi-Tenancy ](./img/hero.png)\\n\\n<!-- truncate -->\\n\\nLarge-scale setups were always \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92ma great reason to choose Weaviate. Last year we wrote about the first time [a Weaviate setup ran with a \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbillion objects & vectors](/blog/sphere-dataset-in-weaviate). What was a mere experiment back then is a \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mregular production case today. But earlier this year, we saw a shift in usage patterns: As we onboarded more \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand more large-scale and enterprise users, the definition of scale shifted from the number of vectors to the \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mnumber of individual tenants that can run on a single se...\u001b[0m                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Here is the comprehensive analysis regarding multi-tenancy in healthcare systems, focusing on the potential </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">applications of Weaviate's multi-tenancy feature:</span>                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">---</span>                                                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Multi-Tenancy in Healthcare: An Industry-Specific Analysis</span>                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">#### Introduction to Multi-Tenancy in Healthcare</span>                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">In the healthcare industry, the ability to serve multiple clients or user groups from a single application is</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">critical. Multi-tenancy offers a solution whereby disparate organizations—such as hospitals, clinics, and </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">healthcare providers—can share resources while maintaining data separation and security. This model allows </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">healthcare institutions to optimize costs, streamline service delivery, and improve patient engagement </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">outcomes by leveraging shared infrastructures.</span>                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">#### Weaviate's Multi-Tenancy Feature</span>                                                                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate, an advanced open-source vector search engine, has introduced a native multi-tenancy feature in its </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">recent versions, set to transform the scalability and usability of healthcare applications. This feature </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">enables organizations to operate multiple distinct tenants on a single setup, addressing the increasing </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">demand for systems that can handle both extensive data inputs and numerous unique users.</span>                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Key advantages of Weaviate's multi-tenancy include:</span>                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">1. **Ease of Use**: Switching to multi-tenancy is optional. Organizations can select this mode for classes as</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">needed without complicating existing operations. Users can engage with Weaviate's powerful query, </span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">replication, and cross-reference features while simply specifying a tenant key—a user-defined property in the</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">schema.</span>                                                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">2. **Scalability**: With native support for millions of tenants, Weaviate is built for large-scale healthcare</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">environments, where each tenant can represent an individual organization or department. According to </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate's latest updates, it effectively supports tens of thousands of active tenants per node, ensuring </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">efficient resource allocation and optimal performance.</span>                                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">3. **Compliance and Security**: Weaviate emphasizes regulatory compliance by supporting features like </span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">GDPR-compliant data management. Healthcare organizations can efficiently manage data deletion and ensure that</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">tenant data remains isolated, which is crucial for confidentiality and patient trust.</span>                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">4. **Cost Efficiency**: Multi-tenancy reduces the overall operational costs for healthcare institutions. By </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">utilizing a single application infrastructure, they can minimize redundant resources, leading to lower </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">maintenance costs and enhanced financial sustainability.</span>                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">#### Applications in Healthcare Systems</span>                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">The integration of Weaviate's multi-tenancy feature in healthcare systems paves the way for innovative </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">applications:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- **Integrated Health Records**: By allowing different departments within a hospital to manage their distinct</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">data sets as individual tenants, multi-tenancy can enhance the process of integrated electronic health </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">records (EHRs). This can lead to improved patient outcomes through streamlined information access across </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">specialized units.</span>                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- **Patient Engagement Platforms**: Multi-tenant architectures enable healthcare organizations to develop </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">personalized patient engagement platforms within a single framework. Providers can tailor communications and </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">information access for different patient groups (e.g., diabetes management, prenatal care) while leveraging </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">shared technology infrastructure.</span>                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- **Research and Data Sharing**: Healthcare organizations can collaborate on research initiatives without </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">risking patient data integrity. Each research team can operate as a separate tenant, ensuring their datasets </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">are isolated yet shared resources are utilized efficiently.</span>                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- **Telehealth Services**: As telehealth continues to expand, multi-tenancy supports diverse healthcare </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">providers in delivering services within the same platform, catering to unique healthcare delivery needs while</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">maintaining compliance.</span>                                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">#### Conclusion</span>                                                                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">The shift towards multi-tenancy in healthcare through platforms like Weaviate represents a strategic move </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">toward more agile, scalable, and secure health systems. By leveraging this feature, healthcare organizations </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">can improve patient engagement, enhance operational efficiency, and most importantly, maintain the integrity </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and confidentiality of patient information in a multi-faceted digital health landscape.</span>                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">In conclusion, adopting Weaviate’s multi-tenancy capabilities could revolutionize how healthcare providers </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">operate—enabling better care delivery, fostering collaboration, and ultimately improving health outcomes for </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">diverse patient populations.</span>                                                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">--- </span>                                                                                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">This detailed analysis elucidates the industry-specific benefits of Weaviate's multi-tenancy feature, </span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">highlighting its relevance and potential in transforming healthcare systems.</span>                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### Multi-Tenancy in Healthcare: An Industry-Specific Analysis\u001b[0m                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Introduction to Multi-Tenancy in Healthcare\u001b[0m                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIn the healthcare industry, the ability to serve multiple clients or user groups from a single application is\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcritical. Multi-tenancy offers a solution whereby disparate organizations—such as hospitals, clinics, and \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhealthcare providers—can share resources while maintaining data separation and security. This model allows \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhealthcare institutions to optimize costs, streamline service delivery, and improve patient engagement \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92moutcomes by leveraging shared infrastructures.\u001b[0m                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Weaviate's Multi-Tenancy Feature\u001b[0m                                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate, an advanced open-source vector search engine, has introduced a native multi-tenancy feature in its \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mrecent versions, set to transform the scalability and usability of healthcare applications. This feature \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92menables organizations to operate multiple distinct tenants on a single setup, addressing the increasing \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdemand for systems that can handle both extensive data inputs and numerous unique users.\u001b[0m                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mKey advantages of Weaviate's multi-tenancy include:\u001b[0m                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m1. **Ease of Use**: Switching to multi-tenancy is optional. Organizations can select this mode for classes as\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mneeded without complicating existing operations. Users can engage with Weaviate's powerful query, \u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mreplication, and cross-reference features while simply specifying a tenant key—a user-defined property in the\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mschema.\u001b[0m                                                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m2. **Scalability**: With native support for millions of tenants, Weaviate is built for large-scale healthcare\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92menvironments, where each tenant can represent an individual organization or department. According to \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate's latest updates, it effectively supports tens of thousands of active tenants per node, ensuring \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mefficient resource allocation and optimal performance.\u001b[0m                                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m3. **Compliance and Security**: Weaviate emphasizes regulatory compliance by supporting features like \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mGDPR-compliant data management. Healthcare organizations can efficiently manage data deletion and ensure that\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mtenant data remains isolated, which is crucial for confidentiality and patient trust.\u001b[0m                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m4. **Cost Efficiency**: Multi-tenancy reduces the overall operational costs for healthcare institutions. By \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mutilizing a single application infrastructure, they can minimize redundant resources, leading to lower \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmaintenance costs and enhanced financial sustainability.\u001b[0m                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Applications in Healthcare Systems\u001b[0m                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe integration of Weaviate's multi-tenancy feature in healthcare systems paves the way for innovative \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mapplications:\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Integrated Health Records**: By allowing different departments within a hospital to manage their distinct\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdata sets as individual tenants, multi-tenancy can enhance the process of integrated electronic health \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mrecords (EHRs). This can lead to improved patient outcomes through streamlined information access across \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mspecialized units.\u001b[0m                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Patient Engagement Platforms**: Multi-tenant architectures enable healthcare organizations to develop \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mpersonalized patient engagement platforms within a single framework. Providers can tailor communications and \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92minformation access for different patient groups (e.g., diabetes management, prenatal care) while leveraging \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mshared technology infrastructure.\u001b[0m                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Research and Data Sharing**: Healthcare organizations can collaborate on research initiatives without \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mrisking patient data integrity. Each research team can operate as a separate tenant, ensuring their datasets \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mare isolated yet shared resources are utilized efficiently.\u001b[0m                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Telehealth Services**: As telehealth continues to expand, multi-tenancy supports diverse healthcare \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mproviders in delivering services within the same platform, catering to unique healthcare delivery needs while\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmaintaining compliance.\u001b[0m                                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Conclusion\u001b[0m                                                                                                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe shift towards multi-tenancy in healthcare through platforms like Weaviate represents a strategic move \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mtoward more agile, scalable, and secure health systems. By leveraging this feature, healthcare organizations \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcan improve patient engagement, enhance operational efficiency, and most importantly, maintain the integrity \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand confidentiality of patient information in a multi-faceted digital health landscape.\u001b[0m                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIn conclusion, adopting Weaviate’s multi-tenancy capabilities could revolutionize how healthcare providers \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92moperate—enabling better care delivery, fostering collaboration, and ultimately improving health outcomes for \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdiverse patient populations.\u001b[0m                                                                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m--- \u001b[0m                                                                                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThis detailed analysis elucidates the industry-specific benefits of Weaviate's multi-tenancy feature, \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhighlighting its relevance and potential in transforming healthcare systems.\u001b[0m                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },

       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Output ──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
