       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">{</span>                                                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"## No more workarounds: Native multi-tenancy support for the largest of </span>                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">cases\\n\\n![multi-tenancy](./img/multi-tenancy-dark.png#gh-dark-mode-only)\\n![multi-tenancy](./img/multi-tenan</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">cy-light.png#gh-light-mode-only)\\n\\nLet me walk you through the best parts of the native multi-tenancy </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">feature in Weaviate `v1.20` and even some of the plans that we have for upcoming releases.        "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Multi-Tenancy is not just an additional feature. It is rethinking from the ground up how your business, with </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">its many customers, scales with Weaviate. ### Ease of use of your favorite Weaviate features\\nWeaviate\\u2019s</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

If you don\\u2019t require it, there are no changes for you.\",</span>                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"* **Cost-efficiency**: With usage peaking around tax season but most tenants inactive for many </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">days of the month, ACME shouldn\\u2019t have to pay for a large setup that is essentially idle most of the </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

While most tenants are small, a few tenants can make up a large </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">bulk of the data. ## A time before multi-tenancy support\\nBefore Weaviate `v1.20`, you had two options to </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">model a multi-tenancy landscape.\",</span>                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"Weaviate `v1.20` - coming in July 2023 - changes this once and for all: Native multi-tenancy </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">support that scales to millions of tenants with 10s of thousands of active tenants per node. Yet scale is not</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">the only point that makes the new multi-tenancy feature great; we put a lot of emphasis on compliance and a </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">smooth UX. GDPR-compliant deletes with one command are just one of the many features. Let me walk you through</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">what\\u2019s coming in the next Weaviate release and show you why I\\u2019m incredibly excited about this one. </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">## The need for multi-tenancy\\nWe define multi-tenancy as the need to serve multiple distinct users or user </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">groups from a...</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m Tool Output \u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m{\u001b[0m                                                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"## No more workarounds: Native multi-tenancy support for the largest of \u001b[0m                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcases\\n\\n![multi-tenancy](./img/multi-tenancy-dark.png#gh-dark-mode-only)\\n![multi-tenancy](./img/multi-tenan\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcy-light.png#gh-light-mode-only)\\n\\nLet me walk you through the best parts of the native multi-tenancy \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfeature in Weaviate `v1.20` and even some of the plans that we have for upcoming releases. As you will see, \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMulti-Tenancy is not just an additional feature. It is rethinking from the ground up how your business, with \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mits many customers, scales with Weaviate. ### Ease of use of your favorite Weaviate features\\nWeaviate\\u2019s\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mnew multi-tenancy mode is opt-in. If you don\\u2019t require it, there are no changes for you.\",\u001b[0m                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"* **Cost-efficiency**: With usage peaking around tax season but most tenants inactive for many \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdays of the month, ACME shouldn\\u2019t have to pay for a large setup that is essentially idle most of the \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mtime. * **Diversity of tenants**: ACME has both large and small customers. Their setup needs to be able to \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhandle tenants of vastly different sizes. While most tenants are small, a few tenants can make up a large \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbulk of the data. ## A time before multi-tenancy support\\nBefore Weaviate `v1.20`, you had two options to \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmodel a multi-tenancy landscape.\",\u001b[0m                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"Weaviate `v1.20` - coming in July 2023 - changes this once and for all: Native multi-tenancy \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msupport that scales to millions of tenants with 10s of thousands of active tenants per node. Yet scale is not\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthe only point that makes the new multi-tenancy feature great; we put a lot of emphasis on compliance and a \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msmooth UX. GDPR-compliant deletes with one command are just one of the many features. Let me walk you through\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwhat\\u2019s coming in the next Weaviate release and show you why I\\u2019m incredibly excited about this one. \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m## The need for multi-tenancy\\nWe define multi-tenancy as the need to serve multiple distinct users or user \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Insight analyst exploring innovations in finance, wealth tech, and regulatory tech</span>                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Based on the gathered information about Multi-tenancy in Weaviate, here is a detailed analysis of its </span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">relevance and benefits for the financial services industry:</span>                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">---</span>                                                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Multi-tenancy in Weaviate: A Financial Services Perspective</span>                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">In the ever-evolving landscape of financial services, the ability to efficiently manage vast amounts of </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">client data while ensuring compliance and security is paramount. Multi-tenancy, a robust architectural </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">feature available in Weaviate, offers significant advantages tailored specifically to the nuanced demands of </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">this sector.</span>                                                                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">#### Definition and Key Features of Multi-tenancy</span>                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Multi-tenancy allows a single instance of the database to serve multiple clients or \"tenants\" concurrently </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">while ensuring that each tenant's data remains isolated from one another. Each tenant operates within a </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">secured environment, where their data cannot be accessed by others, thus maintaining privacy and </span>              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">confidentiality—critical attributes in the finance industry.</span>                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Key features of Weaviate’s multi-tenancy include:</span>                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- **Data Isolation**: Each tenant’s data is stored separately on unique shards. This segregation not only </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">enhances data privacy but also simplifies regulatory compliance, especially with frameworks like GDPR.</span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- **Cost Efficiency**: Financial institutions often experience fluctuating usage patterns—peaking during </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">certain seasons like tax season. Multi-tenancy allows them to leverage shared resources, reducing </span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">infrastructure costs while not compromising on performance.</span>                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

Multi-tenancy in Weaviate ensures that data is isolated,</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">5. **Adaptable Infrastructure**: Financial service providers often need to adapt to changing market dynamics.</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m ✅ Agent Final Answer \u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mInsight analyst exploring innovations in finance, wealth tech, and regulatory tech\u001b[0m                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mFinal Answer:\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mBased on the gathered information about Multi-tenancy in Weaviate, here is a detailed analysis of its \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mrelevance and benefits for the financial services industry:\u001b[0m                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m---\u001b[0m                                                                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### Multi-tenancy in Weaviate: A Financial Services Perspective\u001b[0m                                                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIn the ever-evolving landscape of financial services, the ability to efficiently manage vast amounts of \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mclient data while ensuring compliance and security is paramount. Multi-tenancy, a robust architectural \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfeature available in Weaviate, offers significant advantages tailored specifically to the nuanced demands of \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthis sector.\u001b[0m                                                                                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Definition and Key Features of Multi-tenancy\u001b[0m                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMulti-tenancy allows a single instance of the database to serve multiple clients or \"tenants\" concurrently \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwhile ensuring that each tenant's data remains isolated from one another. Each tenant operates within a \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msecured environment, where their data cannot be accessed by others, thus maintaining privacy and \u001b[0m              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mconfidentiality—critical attributes in the finance industry.\u001b[0m                                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mKey features of Weaviate’s multi-tenancy include:\u001b[0m                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Data Isolation**: Each tenant’s data is stored separately on unique shards. This segregation not only \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92menhances data privacy but also simplifies regulatory compliance, especially with frameworks like GDPR.\u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Cost Efficiency**: Financial institutions often experience fluctuating usage patterns—peaking during \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcertain seasons like tax season. Multi-tenancy allows them to leverage shared resources, reducing \u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92minfrastructure costs while not compromising on performance.\u001b[0m                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Scalability**: Weaviate's architecture enables it to scale seamlessly to accommodate millions of tenants,\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmanaging tens of thousands of active users per node. Scalability is particularly beneficial for large \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfinancial firms that serve diverse client bases, ranging from small businesses to large enterprises.\u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Relevance to Financial Services\u001b[0m                                                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m1. **Regulatory Compliance**: As financial institutions face increasing scrutiny from regulators, the need \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfor compliant data handling has never been greater. With Weaviate’s multi-tenancy feature, financial \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92morganizations can implement data deletion and access controls in a streamlined manner, allowing them to \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcomply with regulations like GDPR efficiently.\u001b[0m                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m2. **Personalization and Client Advisory**: By enabling financial advisors to access personalized data for \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mtheir clients without the risk of data leakage, multi-tenancy empowers firms to offer tailored investment \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mstrategies and personalized communications. This personalization enhances client relationships and drives \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mclient satisfaction.\u001b[0m                                                                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m3. **Operational Efficiency**: The traditional model of dedicated resources for each client can lead to \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92moperational bottlenecks and increased costs. Multi-tenancy optimizes resource utilization, which is critical \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92min the finance sector that demands both high availability and low latency.\u001b[0m                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m4. **Secure Multi-Client Environments**: With the continuous threat of cyberattacks, ensuring the security of\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mclient data is paramount for financial institutions. Multi-tenancy in Weaviate ensures that data is isolated,\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mproviding a fortified barrier against unauthorized access.\u001b[0m                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m5. **Adaptable Infrastructure**: Financial service providers often need to adapt to changing market dynamics.\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mA multi-tenant architecture allows these institutions to quickly scale their services according to market \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdemands and fluctuations in client activity, making it a flexible solution in a fast-paced environment.\u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Conclusion\u001b[0m                                                                                                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">is a purpose-built vector database and Neo4j is a graph database with vector search as an add-on.        "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msearch ... - Weaviate', 'link': 'https://weaviate.io/blog/weaviate-hipaa-compliant', 'snippet': 'Announcing \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate Enterprise Cloud new HIPAA compliance on AWS, enabling secure PHI storage, search, and \u001b[0m               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mvector-powered AI for healthcare ...', 'position': 1}, {'title': 'Security | Weaviate', 'link': \u001b[0m               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m'https://weaviate.io/security', 'snippet': \"We're with you on your security and compliance journey. Weaviate \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mis built on an extensible framework with flexible deployment options that can adapt to the ...\", 'position': \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m2}, {'title': 'Weaviate vs Neo4j on Vector Search Capabilities - Zilliz blog', 'link': \u001b[0m                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m'https://zilliz.com/blog/weaviate-vs-neo4j-a-comprehensive-vector-database-comparison', 'snippet': 'Weaviate \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mis a purpose-built vector database and Neo4j is a graph database with vector search as an add-on. This post \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcompares their vector search capabilities.', 'position': 3}, {'title': 'KRAGEN: a knowledge graph-enhanced \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mRAG framework for ...', 'link': 'https://academic.oup.com/bioinformatics/article/40/6/btae353/7687047', \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m'snippet': 'To do this, we use Weaviate, an open source vector database that supports various embedding \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmodels and query methods (https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate).', 'position': 4}, {'title': 'How AI pioneer \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate grew its workforce 120% with Remote', 'link': \u001b[0m                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m'https://remote.com/resources/case-studies/remote-weaviate', 'snippet': 'Amid soaring demand for AI-native \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92minfrastructure, discover why Weaviate partners with Remote to onboard, manage, and pay its global \u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mworkforce.', 'position': 5}, {'title': 'Pinecone vs Weaviate vs Chroma 2025: Complete Vector Database ...', \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Output ──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">{</span>                                                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"Weaviate empowers doctors, insurers, and care teams to eliminate waste, accelerate claims </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">processing, and deliver more data-driven decisions. Now, you can build HIPAA-ready AI applications on </span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate with confidence, knowing your patients\\u2019 privacy and your compliance obligations are fully </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">protected. ## Weaviate\\u2019s Compliance Journey\\n\\n### Proven Security Foundations: GDPR, SOC II, ISO &amp; </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Beyond\\n\\nWeaviate\\u2019s commitment to data protection is built on a robust framework of industry-leading </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">certifications and audits. For over 18 months, we\\u2019ve maintained SOC II compliance, integrating </span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">comprehensive GDPR controls to secure European and global data. Earlier this year, we completed our Phase 1 </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">audit for ISO 27001:2022, with full accreditation expected by July.\",</span>                                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"Now, we are expanding our certification portfolio by adding HIPAA compliance, which will be </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">incorporated into our next SOC II audit at year-end. Beyond these core standards, our Business Continuity </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Management System aligns with ISO 22301:2019, with full certification planned for 2026\\\\. Together, these </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">milestones demonstrate Weaviate\\u2019s readiness to meet the highest regulatory requirements, ensuring your </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">data remains secure, resilient, and compliant across every market. ### Advanced Security Controls for HIPAA </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Compliance\\n\\nWeaviate Enterprise Cloud on AWS now includes a suite of purpose-built safeguards that meet </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">HIPAA\\u2019s technical requirements and ensure your PHI remains protected at every layer:\\n\\n* **End-to-End </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Encryption:** All data is encrypted in transit (TLS/mTLS) and at rest (AES-256), including internal </span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Kubernetes traffic. This guarantees that ePHI cannot be intercepted or exposed at any point in your </span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">environment.\",</span>                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"---\\ntitle: 'Secure AI for Healthcare: HIPAA-compliant vector search with Weaviate'\\nslug: </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">weaviate-hipaa-compliant\\nauthors: [spiros, nenand]\\ndate: 2025-06-26\\ntags: ['announce...</span>                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m Tool Output \u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m{\u001b[0m                                                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"Weaviate empowers doctors, insurers, and care teams to eliminate waste, accelerate claims \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mprocessing, and deliver more data-driven decisions. Now, you can build HIPAA-ready AI applications on \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate with confidence, knowing your patients\\u2019 privacy and your compliance obligations are fully \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mprotected. ## Weaviate\\u2019s Compliance Journey\\n\\n### Proven Security Foundations: GDPR, SOC II, ISO & \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mBeyond\\n\\nWeaviate\\u2019s commitment to data protection is built on a robust framework of industry-leading \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcertifications and audits. For over 18 months, we\\u2019ve maintained SOC II compliance, integrating \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcomprehensive GDPR controls to secure European and global data. Earlier this year, we completed our Phase 1 \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92maudit for ISO 27001:2022, with full accreditation expected by July.\",\u001b[0m                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"Now, we are expanding our certification portfolio by adding HIPAA compliance, which will be \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mincorporated into our next SOC II audit at year-end. Beyond these core standards, our Business Continuity \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mManagement System aligns with ISO 22301:2019, with full certification planned for 2026\\\\. Together, these \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmilestones demonstrate Weaviate\\u2019s readiness to meet the highest regulatory requirements, ensuring your \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdata remains secure, resilient, and compliant across every market. ### Advanced Security Controls for HIPAA \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mCompliance\\n\\nWeaviate Enterprise Cloud on AWS now includes a suite of purpose-built safeguards that meet \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mHIPAA\\u2019s technical requirements and ensure your PHI remains protected at every layer:\\n\\n* **End-to-End \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mEncryption:** All data is encrypted in transit (TLS/mTLS) and at rest (AES-256), including internal \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mKubernetes traffic. This guarantees that ePHI cannot be intercepted or exposed at any point in your \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92menvironment.\",\u001b[0m                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"---\\ntitle: 'Secure AI for Healthcare: HIPAA-compliant vector search with Weaviate'\\nslug: \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mweaviate-hipaa-compliant\\nauthors: [spiros, nenand]\\ndate: 2025-06-26\\ntags: ['announce...\u001b[0m                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },

     "output_type": "display_data"
    },

     "data": {
      "text/html": [

       "\n"

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Industry researcher focused on biomedical trends and their applications in AI</span>                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Based on the information gathered, here is an industry-specific analysis of why Weaviate's features would be </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">particularly useful for compliance in the biomedical sector.</span>                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">---</span>                                                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**Industry Analysis: Compliance in Biomedical Research with Weaviate**</span>                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">In the rapidly evolving biomedical landscape, adherence to regulatory compliance is paramount, particularly </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">concerning the management of sensitive patient data. The Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">(HIPAA) embodies critical guidelines to safeguard electronic protected health information (ePHI), ensuring </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">that healthcare organizations prioritize data privacy and security. As a prominent emerging technology, </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate’s vector database capabilities offer significant advantages for organizations aiming to streamline </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">compliance procedures while enhancing operational efficiency and patient care.</span>                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Enhancements via Weaviate’s Compliance Features</span>                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">1. **HIPAA Compliance and Data Security**</span>                                                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   Weaviate has recently achieved HIPAA compliance, which is a substantial milestone for organizations </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">looking to store and process ePHI securely. The platform integrates advanced encryption methods (AES-256 for </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">data at rest and TLS/mTLS for data in transit), role-based access controls, and immutable backups, ensuring </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">that patient data remains secure against breaches. This robust security framework assists organizations in </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">meeting HIPAA’s stringent requirements, thus gaining trust from both stakeholders and patients.</span>                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">2. **Efficient Data Management and Processing**</span>                                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   The biomedical field is inundated with vast quantities of data, ranging from electronic health records to </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">imaging studies. Weaviate’s ability to search, index, and retrieve data efficiently means that organizations </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">can reduce manual workflows significantly, thus minimizing errors and processing time. For example, the </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">implementation of semantic search capabilities allows practitioners to query complex datasets, enabling them </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">to gain insights quickly and make informed decisions promptly. This capability is crucial in improving </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">operational efficiency in settings where time-sensitive decision-making can impact patient outcomes.</span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">3. **Semantic Alerts for Proactive Care**</span>                                                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   One critical aspect of compliance is the capacity to react quickly to changing patient conditions. With </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate, organizations can define and implement semantic alerts associated with remote patient monitoring </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">data. For instance, healthcare providers can instantly be informed of concerning trends (like high blood </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">sugar levels correlated with abnormal heart rates), leading to timely interventions. Such proactive measures </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">not only improve patient care but also align with regulatory demands to provide swift healthcare responses.</span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">4. **Improved Patient Engagement and Experience**</span>                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   Comprehensive compliance goes beyond data safety to also encompass the quality of patient interactions. </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate facilitates healthcare providers in accessing a holistic view of a patient's medical history at the </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">point of care. This capability decreases the cognitive load on healthcare professionals and enhances the </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">quality of consultations, ultimately supporting a patient-centric approach. A positive patient experience is </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">not only beneficial for health outcomes but is also aligned with best practices in compliance reporting and </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">documentation.</span>                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">5. **Auditable Access and Compliance Tracking**</span>                                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   Maintaining an auditable record of who has accessed patient data is critical for compliance purposes. </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate offers HIPAA-compliant audit logging for every access request, allowing organizations to track who </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">interacts with sensitive patient information over time. This feature ensures transparency and demonstrates </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">adherence to regulatory mandates, further solidifying an organization’s commitment to patient privacy.</span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Conclusion</span>                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">As biomedical organizations confront growing challenges in managing compliance with regulations such as </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">HIPAA, Weaviate emerges as a powerful ally. By combining advanced vector search capabilities with a proven </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">commitment to security and compliance, Weaviate not only aids in navigating the complexities of biomedical </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">data management but also fosters an environment of innovation. The integration of these features enables </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">healthcare organizations to realize substantial efficiency gains while adhering to the highest standards of </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">compliance, marking a critical evolution in modern biomedical practices.</span>                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">By leveraging Weaviate's strengths, organizations in the biomedical sector can ensure not just compliance, </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">but a transformative approach towards enhanced patient care and operational efficiency.</span>                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">--- </span>                                                                                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">This analysis encapsulates the dual focus on compliance and operational benefits that Weaviate brings to the </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">biomedical industry.</span>                                                                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
