    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">AI-savvy marketer specializing in healthcare systems, digital health, and patient engagement.</span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Hybrid Search, as implemented in Weaviate, offers a transformative approach to handling search queries in </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">healthcare systems. This innovative feature combines the strengths of both vector-based and keyword-based </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">searches to significantly enhance the accuracy and relevance of search results. </span>                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Why Hybrid Search is Useful in Healthcare Systems</span>                                                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">1. **Enhanced Search Accuracy and Relevance**:</span>                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   Hybrid Search enables healthcare professionals to retrieve information that is not only relevant but also </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">contextually accurate. By integrating sparse and dense vectors, Weaviate ensures that searches yield both </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">exact matches (from keywords) and semantically relevant results (from vectors). This is particularly </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">beneficial in healthcare, where the precision of terminology and contextual relevance can be a matter of life</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and death. For instance, when a clinician searches for treatments related to “diabetes,” the system can </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">return results that include synonyms, related conditions, and relevant research articles.</span>                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">2. **Improving Patient Engagement and Experience**:</span>                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   In a world where patient engagement is crucial to health outcomes, Hybrid Search can provide personalized </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">experiences. Patients can search for information about their conditions using everyday language, and the </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">system can return actionable insights that might not be captured through traditional keyword searches. An </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">example is a patient typing “heart issues” receiving a range of results that include nuanced information, </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">from patient education materials to support groups and clinical trial opportunities.</span>                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">3. **Faster Claims Processing**:</span>                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   Hybrid Search can streamline the insurance claims process by enabling quick access to relevant patient </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">histories and treatment records. By vectorizing claims data and clinical information, healthcare </span>              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">organizations can allow claims processors to pull comprehensive summaries that correlate past treatment with </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">current claims, reducing review times and improving operational efficiency.</span>                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">4. **Optimized Remote Patient Monitoring**:</span>                                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   For healthcare providers managing chronic conditions through remote monitoring technology, Hybrid Search </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">can filter through continuous streams of sensor data to identify potential health threats. For example, by </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">combining data from glucose monitors and heart rate sensors, the system can issue alerts based on </span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">user-defined criteria—thus enabling proactive patient management and timely interventions.</span>                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">5. **Personalized Consultations**:</span>                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   One of the challenges faced by healthcare professionals during patient appointments is the need for </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">comprehensive visibility into a patient’s medical history. Hybrid Search allows for quick retrieval of </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">patient summaries that include prior visits, prescribed medications, and relevant lab results. This can lead </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">to better-informed consultations, enhanced patient satisfaction, and improved health outcomes.</span>                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">6. **Efficient Medical-Image Metadata Retrieval**:</span>                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   Hybrid Search can be utilized to manage large quantities of medical imaging data, which often come with </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">diverse free-text annotations. By embedding this metadata into Weaviate, healthcare providers can simplify </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">searches for specific types of scans, improving efficiency and ensuring regulated access. For example, a </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">query for “MRI scans related to brain tumors” can yield rapid and targeted results, accelerating the </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">diagnostic and treatment process.</span>                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Conclusion</span>                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">The integration of Hybrid Search in Weaviate presents a robust solution tailored to address existing </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">challenges in healthcare systems—ranging from improving the accuracy of search results and enhancing patient </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">engagement to optimizing workflows and operational efficiencies. By adopting such advanced search </span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">capabilities, healthcare organizations can transform their data handling processes, ultimately leading to </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">better health outcomes and improved patient care experiences.</span>                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m ✅ Agent Final Answer \u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mAI-savvy marketer specializing in healthcare systems, digital health, and patient engagement.\u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mFinal Answer:\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mHybrid Search, as implemented in Weaviate, offers a transformative approach to handling search queries in \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhealthcare systems. This innovative feature combines the strengths of both vector-based and keyword-based \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msearches to significantly enhance the accuracy and relevance of search results. \u001b[0m                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### Why Hybrid Search is Useful in Healthcare Systems\u001b[0m                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m1. **Enhanced Search Accuracy and Relevance**:\u001b[0m                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m   Hybrid Search enables healthcare professionals to retrieve information that is not only relevant but also \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcontextually accurate. By integrating sparse and dense vectors, Weaviate ensures that searches yield both \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mexact matches (from keywords) and semantically relevant results (from vectors). This is particularly \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbeneficial in healthcare, where the precision of terminology and contextual relevance can be a matter of life\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand death. For instance, when a clinician searches for treatments related to “diabetes,” the system can \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mreturn results that include synonyms, related conditions, and relevant research articles.\u001b[0m                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m2. **Improving Patient Engagement and Experience**:\u001b[0m                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m   In a world where patient engagement is crucial to health outcomes, Hybrid Search can provide personalized \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mexperiences. Patients can search for information about their conditions using everyday language, and the \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msystem can return actionable insights that might not be captured through traditional keyword searches. An \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mexample is a patient typing “heart issues” receiving a range of results that include nuanced information, \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfrom patient education materials to support groups and clinical trial opportunities.\u001b[0m                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m3. **Faster Claims Processing**:\u001b[0m                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m   Hybrid Search can streamline the insurance claims process by enabling quick access to relevant patient \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhistories and treatment records. By vectorizing claims data and clinical information, healthcare \u001b[0m              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92morganizations can allow claims processors to pull comprehensive summaries that correlate past treatment with \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcurrent claims, reducing review times and improving operational efficiency.\u001b[0m                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m4. **Optimized Remote Patient Monitoring**:\u001b[0m                                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m   For healthcare providers managing chronic conditions through remote monitoring technology, Hybrid Search \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcan filter through continuous streams of sensor data to identify potential health threats. For example, by \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcombining data from glucose monitors and heart rate sensors, the system can issue alerts based on \u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92muser-defined criteria—thus enabling proactive patient management and timely interventions.\u001b[0m                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m5. **Personalized Consultations**:\u001b[0m                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m   One of the challenges faced by healthcare professionals during patient appointments is the need for \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcomprehensive visibility into a patient’s medical history. Hybrid Search allows for quick retrieval of \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mpatient summaries that include prior visits, prescribed medications, and relevant lab results. This can lead \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mto better-informed consultations, enhanced patient satisfaction, and improved health outcomes.\u001b[0m                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m6. **Efficient Medical-Image Metadata Retrieval**:\u001b[0m                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m   Hybrid Search can be utilized to manage large quantities of medical imaging data, which often come with \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdiverse free-text annotations. By embedding this metadata into Weaviate, healthcare providers can simplify \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msearches for specific types of scans, improving efficiency and ensuring regulated access. For example, a \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mquery for “MRI scans related to brain tumors” can yield rapid and targeted results, accelerating the \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdiagnostic and treatment process.\u001b[0m                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### Conclusion\u001b[0m                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe integration of Hybrid Search in Weaviate presents a robust solution tailored to address existing \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mchallenges in healthcare systems—ranging from improving the accuracy of search results and enhancing patient \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mengagement to optimizing workflows and operational efficiencies. By adopting such advanced search \u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcapabilities, healthcare organizations can transform their data handling processes, ultimately leading to \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbetter health outcomes and improved patient care experiences.\u001b[0m                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },

       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">        Make sure you find any interesting and relevant information using the web and Weaviate blogs.</span>          <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    </span>                                                                                                           <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",

      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">╭──────────────────────────────────────────── 🔧 Agent Tool Execution ────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Using Tool: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">WeaviateVectorSearchTool</span>                                                                           <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[35m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m 🔧 Agent Tool Execution \u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mInsight analyst exploring innovations in finance, wealth tech, and regulatory tech\u001b[0m                      \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mThought: \u001b[0m\u001b[92mI have gathered some relevant information about Hybrid Search and its applications. Now, I will also\u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msearch the Weaviate blogs to find more specific insights on Hybrid Search within the context of the financial\u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mindustry.\u001b[0m                                                                                                      \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mUsing Tool: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mWeaviateVectorSearchTool\u001b[0m                                                                           \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Input ───────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #e6db74; text-decoration-color: #e6db74; background-color: #ffffff\">\"{\\\"query\\\": \\\"Hybrid Search in the financial industry\\\"}\"</span>                                                     <span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #000080; text-decoration-color: #000080\">│</span>\n",

       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[34m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[34m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[34m Tool Input \u001b[0m\u001b[34m──────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[34m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[34m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[34m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[34m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[38;2;230;219;116;49m\"{\\\"query\\\": \\\"Hybrid Search in the financial industry\\\"}\"\u001b[0m                                                     \u001b[34m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[34m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[34m│\u001b[0m\n",

    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Output ──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">{</span>                                                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"---\\ntitle: Hybrid Search Explained\\nslug: hybrid-search-explained\\nauthors: [erika]\\ndate: </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">2023-01-03\\ntags: ['concepts', 'search']\\nimage: ./img/hero.png\\ndescription: \\\"Learn about the new hybrid </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">search feature that enables you to combine dense and sparse vectors to deliver the best of both search </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">methods.\\\"\\n---\\n![Hybrid search](./img/hero.png)\\n\\n&lt;!-- truncate --&gt;\\n\\nHybrid search is a technique that </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**combines** multiple search algorithms to improve the accuracy and relevance of search results. It uses the </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">best features of both keyword-based search algorithms with vector search techniques. By leveraging the </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">strengths of different algorithms, it provides a more effective search experience for users. The [Hybrid </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">search](/developers/weaviate/api/graphql/search-operators#hybrid) feature was introduced in Weaviate 1.17. It</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">uses sparse and dense vectors to represent the meaning and context of search queries and documents.\",</span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \":::\\n\\n## How does hybrid search work, exactly? ![Hybrid search main image - a figurative image</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">of Weaviate bot combining results from vector and keyword search to produce hybrid </span>                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">search](./img/hybrid-search-illurated.png)\\n\\nHere is an example of a hybrid search:\\n\\n```python\\nresponse =</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">(\\n    client.query\\n    .get(\\\"JeopardyQuestion\\\", [\\\"question\\\", \\\"answer\\\"])\\n    </span>                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">.with_hybrid(query=\\\"food\\\", alpha=0.5)\\n    .with_limit(5)\\n    .do()\\n)\\n```\\n\\nAs mentioned, a hybrid </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">search is really two searches under-the-hood. It performs a vector search (similar to `nearText` or </span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">`nearVector` in Weaviate) to find most similar objects to the vector of your query. Meanwhile, it also </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">performs a keyword search, which ranks results based on how often the query terms occur. In other words, a </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">hybrid search performs both of these searches and combines the results.\",</span>                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"author\": null</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">}{</span>                                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">  \"content\": \"We have prepared [this short </span>                                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">survey](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfxekC2eh5Xkl0iJYEAoOkfhK4FA5AO-O...</span>                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m Tool Output \u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m{\u001b[0m                                                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"---\\ntitle: Hybrid Search Explained\\nslug: hybrid-search-explained\\nauthors: [erika]\\ndate: \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m2023-01-03\\ntags: ['concepts', 'search']\\nimage: ./img/hero.png\\ndescription: \\\"Learn about the new hybrid \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msearch feature that enables you to combine dense and sparse vectors to deliver the best of both search \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mmethods.\\\"\\n---\\n![Hybrid search](./img/hero.png)\\n\\n<!-- truncate -->\\n\\nHybrid search is a technique that \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**combines** multiple search algorithms to improve the accuracy and relevance of search results. It uses the \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbest features of both keyword-based search algorithms with vector search techniques. By leveraging the \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mstrengths of different algorithms, it provides a more effective search experience for users. The [Hybrid \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msearch](/developers/weaviate/api/graphql/search-operators#hybrid) feature was introduced in Weaviate 1.17. It\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92muses sparse and dense vectors to represent the meaning and context of search queries and documents.\",\u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \":::\\n\\n## How does hybrid search work, exactly? ![Hybrid search main image - a figurative image\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mof Weaviate bot combining results from vector and keyword search to produce hybrid \u001b[0m                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msearch](./img/hybrid-search-illurated.png)\\n\\nHere is an example of a hybrid search:\\n\\n```python\\nresponse =\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m(\\n    client.query\\n    .get(\\\"JeopardyQuestion\\\", [\\\"question\\\", \\\"answer\\\"])\\n    \u001b[0m                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m.with_hybrid(query=\\\"food\\\", alpha=0.5)\\n    .with_limit(5)\\n    .do()\\n)\\n```\\n\\nAs mentioned, a hybrid \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msearch is really two searches under-the-hood. It performs a vector search (similar to `nearText` or \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m`nearVector` in Weaviate) to find most similar objects to the vector of your query. Meanwhile, it also \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mperforms a keyword search, which ranks results based on how often the query terms occur. In other words, a \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhybrid search performs both of these searches and combines the results.\",\u001b[0m                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"author\": null\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m}{\u001b[0m                                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  \"content\": \"We have prepared [this short \u001b[0m                                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msurvey](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfxekC2eh5Xkl0iJYEAoOkfhK4FA5AO-O...\u001b[0m                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\">\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\n"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Insight analyst exploring innovations in finance, wealth tech, and regulatory tech</span>                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### The Importance of Hybrid Search in the Financial Sector</span>                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">In today's fast-evolving financial landscape, the ability to efficiently manage and retrieve data is </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">paramount for institutions seeking to maintain a competitive edge. Hybrid Search, a feature introduced in </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Weaviate 1.17, enables organizations to harness the power of both keyword-based and vector search algorithms.</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m ✅ Agent Final Answer \u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mInsight analyst exploring innovations in finance, wealth tech, and regulatory tech\u001b[0m                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mFinal Answer:\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### The Importance of Hybrid Search in the Financial Sector\u001b[0m                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIn today's fast-evolving financial landscape, the ability to efficiently manage and retrieve data is \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mparamount for institutions seeking to maintain a competitive edge. Hybrid Search, a feature introduced in \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mWeaviate 1.17, enables organizations to harness the power of both keyword-based and vector search algorithms.\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThis unique blend of search methodologies is particularly beneficial for the financial industry, where \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92maccuracy and context are crucial for decision-making.\u001b[0m                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Enhancing Data Retrieval\u001b[0m                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mHybrid Search combines the precision of keyword search—which emphasizes the frequency of terms in a \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdataset—with the semantic understanding provided by vector search, known for its capability to capture \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcontext and meaning. For financial institutions, this means that queries can return not only relevant \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdocuments based on strict term matches but also more nuanced results that consider the context of those \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mterms. This is essential for regulatory compliance, as automated systems can identify documents related to \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mspecific regulations while also interpreting the implication of terms like \"compliance,\" \"risk,\" or \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m\"liquidity\" based on broader context.\u001b[0m                                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Improved Fraud Detection\u001b[0m                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIn fraud detection processes, Hybrid Search can significantly enhance a financial firm's ability to identify \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msuspicious activity. For instance, a query regarding unusual transaction patterns can leverage Hybrid Search \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mto return results that include both transactions matching specific keywords, such as \"large transfer\" or \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m\"foreign account,\" as well as those that are semantically similar based on historical data patterns. This \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcombination can help financial analysts detect potential fraud that would not be evident through keywords \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92malone.\u001b[0m                                                                                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Facilitating Investor Personalization\u001b[0m                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mAnother critical application of Hybrid Search is in creating personalized experiences for investors. In \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwealth tech, understanding client needs and preferences is key to providing tailored solutions. By utilizing \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mHybrid Search, financial firms can analyze both structured data (like client demographics) and unstructured \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdata (like feedback or interaction history). This dual approach enables firms to develop customized advice \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand investment strategies that align closely with each client's unique financial goals and risk tolerance.\u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Streamlined Market Research\u001b[0m                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mHybrid Search also plays a pivotal role in market research. Financial analysts tasked with gathering insights\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mon market trends can benefit from this feature by querying vast repositories of financial news, reports, and \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msocial media sentiment. The ability to integrate both keyword relevance and semantic similarity allows \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92manalysts to uncover deeper insights and trends that affect their market strategies—beyond just surface-level \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdata that might be gleaned from traditional searches.\u001b[0m                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m#### Conclusion \u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mIn conclusion, Hybrid Search represents a significant advancement in search technology, offering financial \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfirms a powerful tool to enhance their data retrieval, improve fraud detection, personalize client services, \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand streamline market research. By leveraging Weaviate’s capabilities, financial institutions can ensure they\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mstay at the forefront of innovation, making informed decisions that drive success in a competitive \u001b[0m            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92menvironment.\u001b[0m                                                                                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "[CrewOutput(raw=\"The gathered information provides a comprehensive view of MUVERA's capabilities and its potential applications within the financial sector, particularly in enhancing operations in fintech, compliance automation, and client advisory. Here’s a detailed analysis.\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Industry Specific Analysis: MUVERA and its Usefulness in the Financial Sector**\\n\\nMUVERA, an advanced feature implemented in Weaviate’s 1.31 release, introduces a new approach to managing multi-vector embeddings, delivering significant performance enhancements crucial for the demanding requirements of the financial sector. This analysis delineates how MUVERA can revolutionize various functions within finance, namely fraud detection, investor personalization, and market research.\\n\\n### 1. Enhanced Performance: Speed and Efficiency\\n\\nOne of the standout advantages of MUVERA is its ability to compress multi-vector representations into fixed-dimensional encodings. This process results in remarkable memory savings, reducing the memory footprint from approximately 12 GB to under 1 GB while maintaining strong retrieval quality. The financial sector often operates with vast datasets—be it transactions for fraud detection or customer interaction data for personalized services. The financial implications of these memory improvements could amount to tens or potentially hundreds of thousands of dollars annually in compute costs when utilizing cloud services, thereby appealing to firms looking to manage operational costs effectively.\\n\\nMoreover, the ingestion speed benefits from MUVERA mean that large datasets can be imported and processed exceptionally faster. For instance, a job that previously took several hours to import a million objects can be significantly expedited, thereby increasing the overall productivity of data teams.\\n\\n### 2. Fraud Detection Automation\\n\\nIn the realm of finance, the threat of fraud looms large, necessitating robust detection mechanisms. MUVERA’s capability to manage multi-vector embeddings facilitates advanced anomaly detection algorithms that can evaluate various dimensions of transactional data concurrently. By utilizing MUVERA, financial institutions can improve their fraud detection systems, resulting in quicker identification of suspicious activities, enhancing overall security for both clients and businesses.\\n\\nImplementing these multi-vector representations allows institutions to leverage complex patterns in customer behavior, thereby automating many tasks that would traditionally require intense manual scrutiny.\\n\\n### 3. Investor Personalization and Client Advisory\\n\\nWith the rise of wealth tech, personalized financial services are critical. MUVERA can support sophisticated customer segmentation by efficiently handling and analyzing multifaceted client data, such as historical transactions, preferences, and even social media sentiments. This allows financial advisors to develop tailored investment strategies based on comprehensive client profiles and predicted market movements.\\n\\nAs a result, advisors equipped with MUVERA-augmented tools can enhance their client interactions, providing insights that are both timely and relevant, leading to improved customer satisfaction and retention.\\n\\n### 4. Comprehensive Market Research\\n\\nIn terms of research and market analysis, MUVERA’s speed and efficiency can dramatically reduce the time required to analyze market trends and company performances. With the ability to process complex data structures and retrieve insights rapidly, financial analysts can make more informed decisions based on real-time data analytics instead of relying on outdated information.\\n\\nThe implementation of MUVERA allows for a higher throughput of queries, enabling faster responses to market changes that are critical in trading scenarios. This agility offers analysts a competitive edge in making investment decisions or forecasting market shifts.\\n\\n### Conclusion\\n\\nThe integration of MUVERA into financial applications through Weaviate can lead to improved efficiency in data handling, enriched personalization for clients, enhanced fraud detection capabilities, and accelerated market research processes. As financial institutions strive towards digital transformation and automation, the features provided by MUVERA present a significant enabler of these objectives.\\n\\nIn sum, MUVERA not only improves operational efficiencies but opens new avenues for analytical sophistication, paving the way for innovative applications that can redefine the engagement and security landscapes in finance.\\n\\n--- \\n\\nThis analysis comprehensively outlines the significance of MUVERA and how its features can be strategically beneficial for the financial sector, underpinning enhanced operational efficiencies and innovative opportunities.\", pydantic=None, json_dict=None, tasks_output=[TaskOutput(description='\\n        Conduct a thorough research about MUVERA\\n        Make sure you find any interesting and relevant information using the web and Weaviate blogs.\\n    ', name=None, expected_output='\\n        Write an industry specific analysis of why this Weaviate feature would be useful for your industry of expertise.\\n    ', summary='\\n        Conduct a...', raw=\"**Industry-Specific Analysis of MUVERA in Biomedical Applications**\\n\\nIn the rapidly evolving field of biomedical research, the ability to process and analyze large datasets efficiently is paramount for tasks such as genomic studies, clinical research, personalized medicine, and medical device innovation. MUVERA (Multi-Vector Encoding Representations Algorithm) introduced in Weaviate 1.31 is a significant advancement that addresses the challenges posed by multi-vector models in data storage and retrieval. Here’s why MUVERA's capabilities are particularly beneficial for the biomedical industry:\\n\\n1. **Memory Efficiency and Speed**: Biomedical applications often deal with vast datasets, from genetic sequences to clinical trials. MUVERA transforms multi-vector embeddings into fixed-dimensional single-vector embeddings, resulting in a remarkable reduction of memory footprint by approximately 70%. This efficiency translates into faster data import times—reducing from over 20 minutes to merely 3-6 minutes—paving the way for accelerated research timelines.\\n\\n2. **Compelling Retrieval Performance**: MUVERA facilitates effective retrieval of relevant biomedical information, which is crucial in applications like drug discovery and patient data management. By capturing semantically rich information through multi-vector models, researchers can significantly improve the performance of natural language processing (NLP) tasks in biomedical literature, clinical notes, and even patient dialogues.\\n\\n3. **Scalability for Large Datasets**: The biomedical field demands scalable solutions capable of handling extensive datasets. MUVERA is best suited for large-scale deployments, allowing for the analysis of complex biological datasets without imposing substantial computational overhead. Its ability to compress encodings further when coupled with quantization enables broader accessibility for various applications, such as genomic analysis and real-time diagnostic tools.\\n\\n4. **Reduced Query Throughput Trade-Off**: While MUVERA does introduce some trade-offs in recall quality, this degradation can be counterbalanced by increasing the HNSW (Hierarchical Navigable Small World) ef values. Biomedical applications often require a balance between speed and accuracy; thus, the ability to fine-tune these parameters allows researchers to optimize their search and retrieval processes tailored to specific needs—whether in exploratory analysis or decisive diagnostic measures.\\n\\n5. **Simplified Integration and Accessibility**: One of the prominent features of Weaviate's implementation of MUVERA is its ease of integration. With merely a couple of lines of code, organizations in the biomedical sector can leverage MUVERA capabilities to enhance their existing data infrastructure. This accessibility means that even smaller research labs can adopt cutting-edge technologies without extensive resource investments, democratizing advanced analytics in biomedical research.\\n\\nIn summary, MUVERA positions itself as a transformative tool in bridging the gap between large-scale data analysis and operational efficiency in the biomedical field. Its introduction into Weaviate offers practical and scalable solutions perfectly aligned with the industry's demands for efficient data processing, retrieval performance, and the ability to convert complex embedded information into actionable insights. As we continue to navigate an era where biomedical innovation intertwines closely with AI, tools like MUVERA become indispensable in shaping the future of personalized medicine and research efficiency.\", pydantic=None, json_dict=None, agent='Industry researcher focused on biomedical trends and their applications in AI', output_format=<OutputFormat.RAW: 'raw'>), TaskOutput(description='\\n        Conduct a thorough research about MUVERA\\n        Make sure you find any interesting and relevant information using the web and Weaviate blogs.\\n    ', name=None, expected_output='\\n        Write an industry specific analysis of why this Weaviate feature would be useful for your industry of expertise.\\n    ', summary='\\n        Conduct a...', raw=\"### MUVERA: Enhancing Healthcare Systems with Multi-Vector Retrieval\\n\\n**Overview of MUVERA**\\nMUVERA is a groundbreaking feature within the Weaviate vector database, designed to optimize the handling of multi-vector embeddings. By transforming multi-vector representations into fixed-dimensional encodings, MUVERA reduces memory usage significantly and improves query speeds while maintaining the quality of retrieval. \\n\\n**Key Benefits of MUVERA for Healthcare**\\n1. **Memory Efficiency**: One of the most notable advantages of MUVERA is its ability to reduce memory footprint dramatically. As reported, using MUVERA can cut memory requirements from approximately 12 GB to under 1 GB for healthcare applications that leverage extensive datasets. For hospitals and healthcare systems with large data repositories, this translates to considerable savings on computational resources and energy costs, which could reach tens to hundreds of thousands of dollars per year.\\n\\n2. **Faster Ingestion and Query Speeds**: In healthcare, speed is crucial for improving patient outcomes. MUVERA can accelerate data ingestion processes from upwards of 20 minutes to an impressive 3-6 minutes. This is particularly beneficial when timely access to patient data, medical histories, or imaging studies is necessary. Improved query speeds further enhance the efficiency of patient triage systems, allowing clinicians to retrieve relevant patient data more swiftly.\\n\\n3. **Enhancing Retrieval Quality with Minimal Trade-offs**: While some loss in recall quality may occur with MUVERA when compared to traditional methods, this can be mitigated by adjusting specific parameters like HNSW ef values. For healthcare applications where slight recall degradation can be tolerated, MUVERA provides a pragmatic solution, optimizing resource use without severely compromising the quality of results.\\n\\n4. **Scalability for Large Datasets**: Given the size of data handled by healthcare providers, MUVERA is ideally suited for large-scale deployments. Hospitals often deal with vast amounts of data that require efficient processing and retrieval solutions. MUVERA's ability to compress and handle multi-vector embeddings makes it a strong contender for integration into electronic health records (EHRs) and clinical support systems.\\n\\n5. **Simplicity of Implementation**: From a technical perspective, enabling MUVERA within Weaviate is remarkably straightforward, requiring only a few lines of code. This ease of implementation means healthcare IT departments can reduce the time and resources spent on setting up complex systems, focusing instead on improving patient care and engagement solutions.\\n\\n**Conclusion**\\nIncorporating MUVERA into healthcare systems promises to bring about substantial operational efficiencies, enhance patient care, and drive down costs associated with data management. As healthcare pushes towards more digital and data-driven approaches, leveraging Weaviate's MUVERA can represent a strategic advantage, optimizing workflows in hospital systems and improving health communication with patients. By transforming how healthcare entities manage and retrieve data, MUVERA stands to play a critical role in advancing the industry's capabilities in leveraging vast datasets effectively.\", pydantic=None, json_dict=None, agent='AI-savvy marketer specializing in healthcare systems, digital health, and patient engagement.', output_format=<OutputFormat.RAW: 'raw'>), TaskOutput(description='\\n        Conduct a thorough research about MUVERA\\n        Make sure you find any interesting and relevant information using the web and Weaviate blogs.\\n    ', name=None, expected_output='\\n        Write an industry specific analysis of why this Weaviate feature would be useful for your industry of expertise.\\n    ', summary='\\n        Conduct a...', raw=\"The gathered information provides a comprehensive view of MUVERA's capabilities and its potential applications within the financial sector, particularly in enhancing operations in fintech, compliance automation, and client advisory. This analysis delineates how MUVERA can revolutionize various functions within finance, namely fraud detection, investor personalization, and market research.\\n\\n### 1. Enhanced Performance: Speed and Efficiency\\n\\nOne of the standout advantages of MUVERA is its ability to compress multi-vector representations into fixed-dimensional encodings. For instance, a job that previously took several hours to import a million objects can be significantly expedited, thereby increasing the overall productivity of data teams.\\n\\n### 2.
